message:
fix: Race condition in token refresh and cleanup

- Fix race condition in RefreshProfile by capturing file snapshot before
  checking active profile status, preventing overwrites during concurrent
  profile switches
- Add snapshotMatchesProfile helper to compare live files against vault
  backups for safer active profile detection
- Add comprehensive tests for refresh package (ShouldRefresh, JSON parsing,
  nested field extraction, snapshot matching)
- Add Registry.Clear method to handoff package for testing
- Simplify buildMessage by removing unused opts parameter
- Remove unused handoff import from run_extended_test.go

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -112,7 +112,7 @@ func TestRunCommand_Extended(t *testing.T) {
 	profilesDir := filepath.Join(rootDir, "caam", "profiles")
 	require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(profilesDir, 0755))
 	profileStore = profile.NewStore(profilesDir)
-	
+
 	// Setup registry
 	registry = provider.NewRegistry()
 	registry.Register(claude.New())
